plant.description: Considered a 'Mahavisha' (Great Poison); must be purified in cow milk.

dosage.adults: 8-16mg ONLY. HIGHLY POISONOUS IF NOT PURIFIED.

medicinal_uses: Used in minute doses for severe fevers and joint pain.
Acts as a powerful heart and respiratory stimulant.
Ingredient in many classical pills like 'Ananda Bhairava Rasa'.

safety_profile.warning: UNSAFE EXCEPT IN HIGHLY PURIFIED MINUTE DOSES UNDER EXPERT CARE.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
